lessons.title_cn: 描述最近发生的一件事
lessons.prompt: Describe something that happened recently and stayed on your mind.
Describe an experience you still remember clearly.

lessons.title_en: Describe A Success And What You Gained
lessons.prompt: Describe a success and explain what you gained from it.
Describe a mistake or failure and explain what it taught you.

lessons.title_cn: 描述一次尴尬或不适经历
lessons.title_en: Describe An Awkward Or Uncomfortable Experience
lessons.prompt: Describe an awkward or uncomfortable experience.

lessons.title_en: Describe A Misunderstanding And How You Cleared It Up
lessons.prompt: Describe a misunderstanding and explain how it was cleared up.

lessons.title_cn: 描述一次旅行或出行经历
lessons.title_en: Describe A Trip Or Travel Experience
lessons.prompt: Describe a trip or travel experience that stands out to you.

lessons.title_cn: 描述一次重要决定与原因
lessons.title_en: Describe An Important Decision And The Reason
lessons.prompt: Describe an important decision and explain why you made it.
